title: 收藏我：非会员点击卡片/详细资料/联系对方应统一弹出会员阻断弹框
rawInput:
飞书缺陷 ID: bug_496a05b14dbe
飞书状态: 新增
优先级: P0
反馈日期: 2026-03-11
提报人: dylon
跟进人: ham, 刘瀚卿
父记录: 未填写
来源链接: https://gcncs1osaunb.feishu.cn/wiki/PlLrwARUNixHOXkpflxcPTi9nLh?table=tblSdvRVaxTpHlRY&view=vewLgt4u2h

问题描述:
收藏我：非会员身份，目前点击嘉宾卡片以及详细资料按钮、联系对方按钮都是跳转到新的页面，正确应该统一弹出会员开通阻断弹框

phaseRuns.summary:
**Outcome**
- Readiness verdict is `ready`; I created the triage artifact at `../immortal-in-laws-e2e/agent-memory/workflows/items/wf-2026-03-13T18-18-12-215Z-l5qimx/triage.md:1`.
- No product code was edited in this phase; only the tracker artifact was added.

**Key Findings**
- PRD is explicit that on “收藏我”, non-members clicking card body, `详细资料/照片`, or `联系对方` must all show a member-blocking dialog, not navigate away: `design/1.需求文档/神仙亲家--小程序产品需求文档.md:143`.
- Current source does not unify those entry points: detail/card uses `confirm-modal` in `pages/message-record/index.ts:376`, contact uses `member-unlock-modal` in `pages/message-record/index.ts:464`.
- The record page does not even register `block-dialog`: `pages/message-record/index.json:6`.
- Existing `block-dialog` already fits this flow better because `查看记录` / `联系对方` default to gold-member routing: `components/block-dialog/index.ts:19`.

**Changed Files**
- Added `../immortal-in-laws-e2e/agent-memory/workflows/items/wf-2026-03-13T18-18-12-215Z-l5qimx/triage.md:1`

**Commands Run**
- Inspected repo instructions/context with `rg`, `cat`, `sed`, `nl`
- Located relevant logic in `pages/message-record`, `components/pages/message-record`, `components/block-dialog`
- Verified artifact creation with `sed` and tracker-repo `git status`

**Verification Status**
- Verified `triage.md` exists and starts with the required structure.
- Did not run runtime/UI verification, consistent with triage-only scope.

triage.normalizedTitle: 收藏我：非会员点击卡片/详细资料/联系对方应统一弹出会员阻断弹框
triage.summary: 在 `pages/message-record/index` 的“收藏我”tab（`recordType=favorite` + `direction=other_to_me`）中，非会员用户点击嘉宾卡片主体、`详细资料/照片` 按钮、`联系对方` 按钮时，预期都应停留在当前页并统一弹出会员开通阻断弹框，而不是进入详情页/会话页，或走不同类型的弹框/确认流。
